category_sources: source_facts.description says realtime distributed messaging platform; official NSQ README describes distributed messaging at scale.
display_name_sources: Official nsq.io and GitHub README use NSQ as the project name; source_facts.name is nsq.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is official nsq.io; official GitHub README lists Docs: https://nsq.io.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/nsqio/nsq, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitHub README/topics identify NSQ as a distributed message queue platform.
